$comment: Curated routing map for the trip-planner skill. Route here FIRST, then read only the file you need — do not grep the whole tree. The endpoint catalog (reference/endpoints/*.json) is machine-generated by scripts/build-catalog.mjs; confirm-gate.md is the safety authority and WINS over any convenience.
principle: Only spend when it beats what the base model already does for free. Pay for (1) data the model can't have (live/proprietary/at-scale) or (2) actions it can't take (book/buy/send/call/render+host). Never pay to translate text/photos or score sentiment — the model does that free. See knowledge.md §0.

routing.$paths: All paths below are relative to the skill root (the folder containing SKILL.md).

capabilities.$comment: traveler intent -> endpoint catalog file. Each file lists services with url/method/accepts[]/usage/confirmGate.

authorities.confirmGate: reference/confirm-gate.md — GREEN (sub-$ data/gen, auto) vs RED (goods/booking/send/call, always confirm). The endpoints[].confirmGate field is derived from this; when in doubt, treat as RED.
authorities.payment: reference/wallet-payment.md — the skill never holds keys; the host wallet settles x402. Default Base USDC; any chain OK.
authorities.catalog: reference/endpoints/index.json — capability -> [service ids] with verified flag, price, networks, confirmGate.

rebuild: scripts/build-catalog.mjs regenerates reference/endpoints/*.json from the MasterKey registry (+ baked Bazaar routing + Apify actors). Run when VERSION's registry_sync changes.
